title: Record acknowledgement payload
description: Emitted by `<subject> record --item <id> --result pass|partial|fail [...] --json`. The driver's write-back after grading: the subject appends the raw result to its history, updates the item's mastery on its ladder, and acks with the normalized raw-result object. That `recorded` object is the exact record learn-cli appends to its cross-subject ledger — the sole input to the motivation layer's deterministic scores/streaks/review-queues. Subjects MUST NOT compute scores: the recorded object structurally forbids score-like fields.

recorded.description: The normalized raw result, as persisted. Raw observations only — never derived numbers.

correct.description: Raw count of correct responses, when countable.

total.description: Raw count of graded responses, when countable.

mastery.description: The item's mastery after applying this record (inferred from result unless set explicitly; never regresses on inference).

recommendation.description: The subject's recommended next step within itself, refreshed after the write.
